headline: Leidos Expands Rural Health Reach While Showcasing Broader AI Capabilities
summary: Leidos Holdings' QTC Health Services unit is rolling out mobile clinics, AI-enabled tools, and telehealth technology to expand access to care in rural U.S. communities. The initiative focuses on underserved areas where patients often face long travel times and limited provider availability. This effort marks a broader application of Leidos' technology capabilities beyond its core defense and government contracting work. For investors watching NYSE:LDOS, this healthcare push comes as the...

headline: Republicans balk at Senate Democrats' DHS shutdown counteroffer
summary: Congress and the White House are working to reach a funding deal before Congress leaves for a scheduled two-week recess on Friday.

headline: 2 Mid-Cap Stocks Worth Your Attention and 1 That Underwhelm
summary: Many investors pay attention to mid-cap stocks because they have established business models and expansive market opportunities. However, their paths to becoming $100 billion corporations are ripe with competition, ranging from giants with vast resources to agile upstarts eager to disrupt the status quo.

headline: Is RTX Corporation (RTX) the Best Aerospace and Defense Stock to Buy According to Billionaires?
summary: RTX Corporation (NYSE:RTX) is among the 10 Best Aerospace and Defense Stocks to Buy According to Billionaires. On March 10, the company announced that its Pratt & Whitney business had secured a follow-on contract to provide TJ150 engines for Leidos’ AGM-190A small cruise missiles. The turbojet engine is used in several missile programs worldwide, with […]
